creator: jedgar@fxp.org
text:
On Tue, 4 Jan 2000, Jamie Heckford wrote:

>  XIt is basically a front-end (but VERY easy to use) to
>  Xdagrab and bladeenc, which must be installed in your
>  Xpath.

Then shouldn't dagrab and bladeenc be listed as RUN_DEPENDS?
